reviews.text: I had a great experience w Alaska functional Medicine & Spa this clinic is clean and so professional front staff is friendly I  seen Greyson he is truly amazing he listened and gave me exactly what I wanted at my appointment . I will be back I wish I could give more than 5 stars . Thank you

reviews.name: places/ChIJIaDxMaaXyFYRE7aLFGNWXuc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aSmVXeDRTRXR1VWtKbmRrTndlVWxKZHpSaVJFRRAB
reviews.text: AK Functional Medicine is my new favorite place! Very knowledgeable and welcoming! Sydney is amazing at what she does. My Microneedling appt went amazing and I’m counting down the days until my next appt. All of the staff feels like family, and the facility is very clean and well kept!

reviews.name: places/ChIJIaDxMaaXyFYRE7aLFGNWXuc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWdlpHbFpjRzVPVGs0eWFtWjNNV3RVVVc5V1YwRRAB
reviews.text: Greyson is the best! He is knowledgeable about his craft and makes you feel comfortable! I walk out feeling like a new person!

reviews.name: places/ChIJIaDxMaaXyFYRE7aLFGNWXuc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205VWNHRmxNek4wU1U4eU1XdG9OMjkwWjJoSVJFRRAB
reviews.text: My girl Ashley is the best!! Love the staff, products and services!!✨🩷

reviews.name: places/ChIJIaDxMaaXyFYRE7aLFGNWXuc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkd3FQZUJBEAE
reviews.text:
I’ve had facials by both Olivia and Kristen, and always leave relaxed and refreshed! I have also had Botox by Greyson and loved the results. The front staff are so sweet and I always feel welcome and taken care of here.
Update - I still can't say enough good things about this place. I had a reaction to one of the procedures (no fault of theirs, my skin was prone to it) and they bent over backwards to help me. I've had last minute scheduling conflicts and they were happy to reschedule me and even honor the pricing of the original appointment. I said it the first time in my review but I always feel taken care of here, their customer service is off the charts!

reviews.name: places/ChIJYci5J3KXyFYRy7KiGdo2fPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGV1QwMUZXVGxNYzFOUFExZFRlVjlzUVdabU5HYxAB
reviews.text:
Gameday Men’s Health has quickly become an important part of my performance team as I work to maximize my performance. The staff is extremely knowledgeable and always takes time to answer questions. They are very customer‑oriented, and I’ve consistently felt supported and well cared for at every visit.
I highly recommend their services.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYci5J3KXyFYRy7KiGdo2fPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pRNVZFSlhVMUpyTm1SalRWVjZaMDlIYjA1TE0xRRAB
reviews.text: I wish more medical practices operated like Game Day Men’s Health. The staff is knowledgeable, professional, and clearly committed to evidence-based, up-to-date care. I haven’t felt this good in years. They take the time to listen and explain, which makes the entire experience easy and reassuring. Highly recommend.”  Reference my name for extra deal!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJYci5J3KXyFYRy7KiGdo2fPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tweVYwdFhOQzFSY21SemVFaFNiMUJRU2t0MGIwRRAB
reviews.text:
Had a pretty bad experience with Gameday from lack of training on how to administer injections, allergic reactions with no plan on what to do, and a real lack of communication and follow up.

Although I did have great results at first with my T levels getting optimized. It was just everything else that goes into creating a positive experience for clients.

Anyone not familiar with Gameday make sure you ask lots of questions on their process and how they do things and what you’re going to be expected to do, it changed every week for me.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYci5J3KXyFYRy7KiGdo2fPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WQk5sTXpXa2xXV2s1dVh6TktXRkkzU21wakxYYxAB
reviews.text:
This place changed my life. I have tried for years with the old school doctor ways and they told me im 50 and right where i should be. I was low energy in all areas and after 4 months i have never felt better!!
I feel like im 25 again.
The best staff.
Go to gameday they will change your life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYci5J3KXyFYRy7KiGdo2fPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ablF6UjRSRXQxU25OSFNHeFlXV2hxYW1GTE5GRRAB
reviews.text:
My husband and I started with Game Day a few months again and SUCH great results so far! Ladies, get the glow!!!! It works and is amazing! In my late 30's and I can def see a difference in my skin with anti-aging and tightening. Highly recommend!
Super clean spot and great customer service!

name: Laura Evans Functional Medicine & Wellness
classificationReason: Functional medicine clinics typically offer hormone optimization services

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwhqr8CXyFYRrqjm5Em_loo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGNlVTMUpOVXd0VW0xWmVGOXVZVkpEUkZOQ1JsRRAB
reviews.text:
From our very first appointment, I knew I was in the right hands. Laura is incredibly thorough and detailed—she takes the time to really listen and understand the full picture before crafting a thoughtful plan. What truly sets her apart is her ability to think outside the box. She doesn’t rely on cookie-cutter solutions but instead approaches each problem with curiosity, intelligence, and compassion.

Healing from chronic illness isn’t a quick fix, and what I appreciate most is Laura’s commitment to the process. She never rushes. There’s a steady, patient pace to her care that feels both supportive and sustainable. She helps me stay grounded in the long-term view while celebrating the small wins along the way.

Thanks to Laura, I finally feel like I’m moving in the right direction. If you’re looking for a practitioner who truly partners with you, who’s deeply knowledgeable, and who genuinely cares, I can’t recommend Laura enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwhqr8CXyFYRrqjm5Em_loo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205RVFsaFRTRk5xWTBWd2JGOXhRMFpvWVhwR1UwRRAB
reviews.text: Laura has been fantastic! She really takes the time to listen and asks great follow up questions to make sure she gets the whole picture. She makes a tailored plan that works for you and you always walk away feeling heard and like your needs are being met. 10/10 recommend!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwhqr8CXyFYRrqjm5Em_loo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsV2R6VjBiRU5wVG1JNUxUbHJlVGhDT0dWbVUxRRAB
reviews.text: Laura has been an invaluable support throughout my health journey. She creates a warm, comfortable environment and seems to genuinely care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwhqr8CXyFYRrqjm5Em_loo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3cU5xSXBRRRAB
reviews.text: Laura is phenomenal! She is one of the most caring, compassionate providers I have ever had the pleasure of seeing. She truly listens to me and my concerns, and seeks to find a solution that will treat me as a whole person rather than just in each new issue that arises. Laura also looks for ways to heal without the use of medication as much as possible, which I really appreciate. She is one of those truly incredible people - such a light in this world, who makes you feel better just by being around her! 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwhqr8CXyFYRrqjm5Em_loo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiMC1ta0JBEAE
reviews.text:
Laura Evans is exceptionally knowledgeable and passionate about supporting the health and wellbeing for her clients. She took the time to thoroughly understand my health concerns and worked with me to create a personalized wellness plan that addressed my specific needs. Her holistic approach, which considers the root causes of health issues rather than just the symptoms, is truly refreshing.

Throughout my sessions, I felt genuinely cared for and supported. Laura's expertise and dedication to her clients' well-being are evident in every interaction. She provided me with valuable insights and practical advice that have made a significant difference in my overall health.

The clinic itself is a calming and welcoming space, designed to make clients feel comfortable and at ease. The attention to detail and commitment to creating a positive environment are evident throughout.

I highly recommend Laura Evans Functional Medicine & Wellness to anyone seeking a comprehensive and compassionate approach to health and wellness. I am grateful for the positive impact she has had on my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJl1X1p4uXyFYR5rFOgst6f00/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201cVUzbDVNMk5OYVd4c1JWaDZia1JLZVdWWldYYxAB
reviews.text: This is by far the best women’s clinic that I’ve been to. You can tell that this is their specialty. Dr. Ade has the best bedside manner that I’ve experienced ever in a medical setting. She’s not just compassionate, she listens actively and intently. I’ve never once felt rushed during an appointment and she will answer any and all questions you may have. Your treatment is truly tailored to your needs. She treats you as a whole, not just there to throw hormones at you and call it a day. Ms Shantelle is super welcoming and just the kindest. She also does great blood draws. I love that I wasn’t sent to some seedy place to get it done. Everything is in office and it’s a relaxing, clean environment. If you want well rounded, thorough care, this is your place.

reviews.name: places/ChIJl1X1p4uXyFYR5rFOgst6f00/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twaE5GSlRURVJJYkhGVlNVNHphbmsyYkdSWGVuYxAB
reviews.text:
I’m happy with the service! And already feel much better. I recommend this place %100! I also like that they have different payment plans with options that best suits my needs. Additionally, I would like to make a big deal about how Miss Chantelle performs labs! I have had really bad experience in the past with blood drawn from my arm, but no more thanks to this AMAZING lady! She’s quick, calm, and painless! I wasn’t anxious at all seeing her for the labs the second time!
So thank you so much Ms.Chantelle!

reviews.name: places/ChIJl1X1p4uXyFYR5rFOgst6f00/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205ZlgydDZMV1oxYzNGU09FVm5abTB5WVc5UVdtYxAB
reviews.text: I love this place! Shantell at the front is warm welcoming and very supportive. Both the doctors are amazing. Started with just a free consultation which made me realize how my life could improve with their help. This is the best committed Dr.- Patient  relationship I've had! If youre not sure, just take the chance and know they really do care about the WHOLE you... not just what the labs and the medical statistics say... they dig to understand where you are BEFORE it becomes a problem. Im a loyal fan!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJl1X1p4uXyFYR5rFOgst6f00/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KbWNsTkdZME5YUzNBMFgzcE1PVXBzTld0MlJFRRAB
reviews.text:
I had a really positive experience at Rejuvenate and Wellness. This is a medical clinic focused on women’s hormone health, and you can tell right away that the care is thorough and evidence-based.

The provider took time to review my history, labs, and symptoms instead of brushing things off as “normal.” I appreciated how clearly everything was explained — what the numbers meant, why I was feeling the way I was, and what treatment options were available. The plan felt individualized rather than one-size-fits-all.

I also never felt rushed or dismissed, which unfortunately can happen when dealing with hormone concerns. The staff was professional, respectful, and easy to talk to, and the follow-up communication was excellent.

If you’ve been struggling with fatigue, mood changes, cycle changes, or other hormone-related symptoms and want answers instead of guesswork, I would definitely recommend Rejuvenate and Wellness.

reviews.name: places/ChIJl1X1p4uXyFYR5rFOgst6f00/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSUVZFMUVhMDFGU2tRMGIxZHZTVWh5U0VZNGVuYxAB
reviews.text: Rejuvenate has been such a game changer for me. They have helped me reach my weight goals by helping me balance my entire health, not just a quick fix. The staff is fantastic and always listen and my concerns and goals. I love that they offer solutions that are going to help me long term and are good for my overall health head to toe.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKX4wlcpaMlERhAaJqxkSedo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzZ0xxNmNnEAE
reviews.text: As a patient of Dr. May, an ND, my prescriptions are managed through Dr. Rice’s office for a monthly fee. When my pharmacy faxes a refill request to Dr. Rice’s office, it is often a 4-7 day wait to get a response. Diane, the office manager explained to me that they are a micro practice, with herself being the only staff member. She said a week is normal for processing a prescription refill. From my perspective as a patient, this is stressful and inconvenient, since I have no way of knowing if Dr Rice’s office has received the request and are working on it for up to a week. If they have not received it (which has happened twice), then I am starting the week long process again. Adding to the frustration is the fact that they have limited office hours and most often I only get a recording when I call. This is not a patient-oriented set up.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKX4wlcpaMlERhAaJqxkSedo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbFByUDdnRRAB
reviews.text: I've had a great experience working with Dr. Rice. He appears to be one of the only doctors in town working with patients from a "functional" approach, dealing with hormones, gastrointestinal, genetics, life stress and overall well being, getting to my root cause issues unlike other doctors in town that will barely give you five minutes and your out the door. Every visit has been about an hour or until all questions and lab work have been gone over. It looks like some of the reviewers have had a hard time reaching the office but I have never had a problem either getting in contact with him or his friendly assistant. Once your a patient he or his assistant can be easily reached via an online portal.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKX4wlcpaMlERhAaJqxkSedo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNUtMSXh3RRAB
reviews.text: I have had multiple aesthetic procedures done and have been satisfied each time! The office is beautiful and clean and the attention to detail shows. Sam has been very helpful in assessing my skin care needs and can see an improvement in my skin already! Highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKX4wlcpaMlERhAaJqxkSedo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwa1lXTmlRRRAB
reviews.text: Not impressed at all! I made an appointment 6 weeks ago for my son. I tried many times to call and confirm but could not get through since their phone line did not work. Dr.Rice called the day of my appointment to let me know he had given away the appointment since he couldn't confirm it.  So I decided to stop by their office. When I arrived there was nobody there.  After sitting in the waiting room for about five minutes,  Diane breezed in. I think she is supposed to be the office manager.  She apologized and rescheduled our appointment for the next day.  The next day I show up with my son.  After waiting for about fifteen minutes in the waiting room I get a call from Diane.  Apparently she had forgotten about our appointment and thought it had been scheduled for November 8th. She apologized and said she would call me right back with a new appointment.  I never heard from her again. Two trips to that office in 24 hours and no appointment.  Until they get their act together I would not recommend anyone giving them a try. Highly unprofessional in my opinion. Oh and did I mention they do not bill insurance? They are cash only.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKX4wlcpaMlERhAaJqxkSedo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHODlLNmpBRRAB
reviews.text: Thank you Sam and Amie for such an amazing experience with the amazing skin care and to my new journey to prep me for micro needling. I did the WiQu peel and it’s only been a few days but I can honestly see results and minimal to no peeling. The office is super clean and cozy and the staff is amazing and very attentive. Can’t wait to go back for my next peel.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuXtbd8dRMlERx6UFLXB7B8U/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJMzhzSlMycHNtTTBBRRAB
reviews.text: Friendly, professional staff, small clinic feel, quick and easy to get an appointment when needed. My family and I have seen NP Vinger for over 5 years and we are consistently impressed with her expertise and willingness to really listen and involve us in our health care decisions. She provides respectful, compassionate care, which is becoming more rare in this era of institutionalized medicine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuXtbd8dRMlERx6UFLXB7B8U/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNieThUdDJnRRAB
reviews.text: PA Conley is amazing as well as the other providers and staff 💗!  I saw PA Conley at another clinic and followed her here. She actually listens  with helping you the best way possible and follows thru for answers. The staff at the front desk is always smiling and just as helpful. When I call they give me all the information they can. The clinic has a portal you can even send a message and even other providers read them and help on her days off! Highly recommend. Well organized clinic who all want to help patients!

reviews.name: places/ChIJuXtbd8dRMlERx6UFLXB7B8U/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUc1A3ZkpREAE
reviews.text: Dr. Pierce and his staff are excellent. They have helped me lose more than 140 pounds and are always willing to answer my questions and guide me to the solutions which best fit my lifestyle. Dr. Pierce is friendly and knowledgeable and also isn't afraid to challenge me to step out of my comfort zone to try new things. He also is good at calling me out when needed! An excellent medical practice with excellent staff...I highly recommend Goldstar Longevity.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuXtbd8dRMlERx6UFLXB7B8U/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3aWR6cWtnRRAB
reviews.text: If I could give negative stars, I definitely would! I went to an appointment with P.A. Howe for severe hives/itching, only to have him tell me to take more Zyrtec and switch to free and clear laundry detergent! No testing or labs or anything!!! And if that wasn’t insulting enough, they charged me 500.00 for that one 20 minute office visit with a P.A., not even a doctor!!! This place is a ridiculous scam!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJuXtbd8dRMlERx6UFLXB7B8U/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBdEx1b0ZREAE
reviews.text: I usually goto Teal Vingar but, everyone there is super professional and nice! They're never made me feel like a bother and always listen to my concerns, which is saying alot because I have Ehlers Danlos Syndrome and there's always something going wrong with my body. I highly recommend Gold Star Clinic and all the medical professionals that work there!

reviews.name: places/ChIJAQDQizFbMlER5NV1CcQ_ADc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZMmRER1hnEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Pierce is by far the best doctor in Fairbanks. I can't say enough good things about him. He listens to me. He asks questions. He wants to get to the root cause of something and treat the whole person not just a symptom or a factor. I've never been so happy with a doctor in Alaska.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAQDQizFbMlER5NV1CcQ_ADc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4bjdpQmxnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Pierce and staff are top notch.  They will treat you as a patient and not a number.  They will give you the customized care you deserve.  I highly recommend Dr. Pierce

reviews.name: places/ChIJTy-QVz9nxlYR2P_QBUBW0jI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkcDZPeGZ3EAE
reviews.text: Working with Dr. Bob has been an incredible experience so far. He is super knowledgable about medicine and how to improve the performance of your health in the most detailed way. I look forward to working with Dr. Bob for many years into the future.  I know he cares about his patients and wants to see them achieve optimum health and longevity for the future. At 60,  he is helping me take my health and body composition to a whole another level. "60 is the new 40". Thanks Dr. Bob

reviews.name: places/ChIJTy-QVz9nxlYR2P_QBUBW0jI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVci1MalV3EAE
reviews.text:
I always look forward to my annual check up!  I learn a lot each time I talk to Dr Ledda.   I love how he keeps up with new advancements in health-care, He isn't afraid to share any new changes in health-care that would benefit his patients.
I highly recommend him, if fact I  have!

reviews.name: places/ChIJTy-QVz9nxlYR2P_QBUBW0jI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtLTlLcVFnEAE
reviews.text:
If you’re looking to stay healthy and longevity I highly recommend starting Cengenices for anyone at any age or any stage in life.
Dr. Ledda and staff did amazing job. This team always there to answer questions or get something I need to stay on track for good health. Dr. Ledda spend time going over all labs and gets to know the patient never feel rushed at my appointments.
Thank you Derick, Mark and Dr. Bob for everything could not be without your help.

reviews.name: places/ChIJTy-QVz9nxlYR2P_QBUBW0jI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1MThQZDZ3RRAB
reviews.text: Bob Ledda is one of the most experienced Doctors you will find in Alaska. as an Airline Pilot who has been around the World 500 times and flown into every State of the USA I can say the lack of Qualified and experienced Doctors and Specialists in that great State are far fewer than any other State due to the very tough and long Winters that tend to make it not most Doctors first choice of practice, you may have only 1 specialist for ent or foot or eyes in one town. Bob embraced Alaska and brings his 25 Years as a Emergency Room Doctor who has seen it all and uses this to treat through cenegenics each individual with compassion and knowledge of the Human Anatomy. Bob is Highly recommended by me one of his patients Terry Johnson former UPS Boeing 767 International Instructor.

reviews.name: places/ChIJTy-QVz9nxlYR2P_QBUBW0jI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjdlBTX1hREAE
reviews.text: Everything about my Cenegenics experience to date has been superb. First, I am more than happy to be part of this team and hopefully will be with them for many years. The phone support with the administrative and other counselling points of contact were professional and personable. The first personal contact I had with a member of the team was with my phlebotomist who came to my home to draw blood and urine samples, which was very convenient. The next step was taking a battery of tests (cognitive, dexterity, etc.) performed online in the comfort of my home. I was also able to fill out my present health questionnaire on my PC. The next phase was a lengthy consultation with Dr. Robert Ledda via Skype. Dr. Ledda and I talked for quite a while and with my lab results and what I relayed to him verbally, enabled him to analyze where I was at health wise. We will meet soon so I can take in-person physical tests he needs to complete my physical evaluation. We agreed on a plan of attack to get me to my personal goals of better overall health and enjoying my longest span of life possible. I’ve only been on the program with testosterone shots, supplements, and lifestyle changes week or so and already feel more energetic. Cenegenics is taking care of their area of expertise and I am taking responsibility for areas that are my concern. I am expecting good things from this partnership and with the help of Cenegenics will make the most of this opportunity. Marc

reviews.text: I am extremely happy with this service. Jorin has been incredibly helpful on my journey to better my health. I’ve lost 40 pounds since I started treatment with her. She is knowledgeable in all areas of Men’s Health. If you’re looking to get your mind and body in tip top shape stepping foot in her office is a solid place to start.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ85IbrXDhyFYR1KiSX_9PeRI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsRmFFczJaRE15VmxKRE1GUkRja2M1YVdnMk9WRRAB
reviews.text: I had a pleasure of working with Jorin Colt. She is professional, caring and knowledgeable. Her passion for helping men’s health and optimizing hormones are contagious. She truly cares and goes above and beyond for her patients. I highly recommend. You are in good hands.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ85IbrXDhyFYR1KiSX_9PeRI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xJNGIwNU1NRzFhTTFKdmRYRkdRbVJoUzB4TlkyYxAB
reviews.text: The personalized care here is exceptional. The team stays in close contact, is extremely responsive, and offers true support. You can tell they are deeply knowledgeable and committed to men’s health and optimization. We felt supported every step of the way

reviews.name: places/ChIJ85IbrXDhyFYR1KiSX_9PeRI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaDZ1ajRBRRAB
reviews.text:
I am extremely happy with the care I am receiving Elite Men's Health.

Jorin is incredibly knowledgeable about specifics related to men's health.

Excellent bedside manner, zero judgement, and an eagerness to help you feel better.

Sign up was a breeze, response time through the secure messaging is fast, and costs are very reasonable.

Best of all....located right here in the Mat-Su Valley.  No more need to seek care from the lower 48. Support local & Alaska!

I absolutely can not express enough gratitude and praise for Jorin and Elite Men's Health.

Do yourself a big favor call today.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ85IbrXDhyFYR1KiSX_9PeRI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvaVptWFF3EAE
reviews.text: Jorin is an amazing provider. She has so much knowledge of men's health! As a wife and a provider myself, I can absolutely recommend her clinic as an expert provider in men's health. 11/10 recommend!!!
